release_name: Documentation Pruning, OpenAPI Polish, and Contributor Readiness
test_target: 90+ backend tests including v2.0 control-plane smoke tests
positioning: Open-source AgentOps control plane for governing, evaluating, operating, and auditing enterprise AI agents before production.
next_release: v2.1 — OpenAPI polish, CLI demos, documentation pruning, and contributor-ready issues
production_boundary: The release is a control-plane reference implementation. Live providers, live connectors, raw secrets, production IAM, and irreversible write-back remain disabled.
recommended_next_release: v2.4 Demo Storytelling Pack and Public Launch Assets
release: v2.3 Reference Deployment Profiles and Local Docker Compose
current_focus: Public Site UX Polish and Interactive Demo Path
